diffs.diff:
--- a/fix_train.py
+++ b/fix_train.py
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+p='train.py'

+s=open(p).read()

+if 'ann = ann.long()' not in s:

+    s = s.replace('ann = ann.to(device, non_blocking=True)', 'ann = ann.to(device, non_blocking=True).long()')

+    open(p,'w').write(s)

+print('patched')

+print(open(p).read()[-200:])

--- a/train.py
+++ b/train.py
@@ -169,7 +169,7 @@
         t0 = time.time()

         for i, (img, ann) in enumerate(train_loader):

             img = img.to(device, non_blocking=True)

-            ann = ann.to(device, non_blocking=True)

+            ann = ann.to(device, non_blocking=True).long()

             optim.zero_grad()

             with torch.cuda.amp.autocast(dtype=torch.float16):

                 out, aux = model(img)
